description: Renders live DFG summary, Mermaid flowchart, Declare conformance report, fitness score, and activity legend from active AntiLlmDiagnostic observations.
open: Live session transcript with a connected LSP client requesting anti-llm://process-model URI is absent — required for ADMITTED status.

check_conformance — empty (conformant), victory language (absence violation), receipt detection (responded_existence satisfied)

render — empty state sections and status, Mermaid block well-formedness, PARTIAL status on victory language, activity nodes present, activity legend completeness, fitness 100% with no diagnostics, short case name in violation table
